use_cases: Primary call-to-action buttons for forms and dialogs
Destructive action buttons for delete or warning operations
Outline buttons for secondary actions alongside primary CTAs
Ghost buttons for subtle navigation or inline actions
Link-style buttons for inline text navigation
ai_summary: A versatile button component with six variant styles (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and four size options, built with Radix UI Slot for composition and CVA for variant management. Features accessible focus states, disabled states, and shadow effects for depth.
